pr.title: Add non-record EMA and adaptive export exploration

output.summary: Extends Int6 MLP3x+SmearGate+BigramHash+Muon baseline with late-stage EMA smoothing and budget-aware export pruning to explore sub-16MB feasibility.
techniques: Late-stage EMA smoothing (β=0.9998, start at 80%) to refine final weights.
Adaptive export-time pruning search over 0–5% ratios targeting a 15.95MB artifact budget.
Retains the quantized MLP3x backbone with SmearGate, BigramHash, and Muon infrastructure.
